fear: Being identified as the informant by Elias Cutter, whom he has worked alongside on two previous network operations and who trusted him.
name: Prentiss Hoyle
role: Gandy dancer, Erie rail maintenance crew
voice: Slow-spoken, uses physical labor metaphors, refers to everything in terms of weight and distance — uncomfortable with direct questions.
secrets: He did not do this for political reasons — Greer threatened to report him for a theft from a previous employer unless he cooperated.
He has already sent one message to Greer tonight using a written note passed to a rider at the Huron Road tavern — he cannot take it back.
knowledge: He confirmed to Greer, via a dead-drop message at the Huron Road mile marker, that the passengers were in the root cellar beneath the freight house.
He knows the secondary cache point location because Elias mentioned it in passing three weeks ago.
He knows the ferry signal pattern — he overheard Elias describe it to a safe-house keeper.
He does not know that Caleb is aware of his role — he believes his contact with Greer was entirely covert.
publicFace: A quiet, hardworking track laborer who is often seen along the Sandusky spur at odd hours — his work schedule is irregular, which is normal for maintenance crews.
represents: REQUIRES FACT-CHECK — verify the historical role of this character in the scenario
trustLogic: Responds to being treated as a peer by working men. Becomes evasive when questioned by anyone who seems educated or official.
privateGoal: Collect the remaining payment Aldous Greer promised him for confirming the passengers' location and route.

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Runs along the rail spur toward the Huron crossing — he knows the ballast path in the dark.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Fast over rough ground, uses the rail ties as stepping stones, cuts toward the tree line.
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Talks about his work, the ballast condition, the weather — anything adjacent to the actual question.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not admit the note to the rider — that is the one act he cannot explain away.
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If shown the nulled codebook clue and told his name appears in it.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Claims he was just walking the line for a night inspection, which is within his job description.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Breaks quickly once cornered — offers Greer's location in exchange for being allowed to leave.
